name: Prodea Real Estate Investment Company Societe Anonyme
summary: Prodea Real Estate Investment Company Soci√É¬©t√É¬© Anonyme, together with its subsidiaries, invests in, manages, and operates real estate properties primarily in Greece, Italy, and Romania. The company's properties include retail and office properties, and land plots, as well as city hotels, storage spaces, archives, petrol stations, and parking spaces. It primarily serves blue-chip tenants. The company is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
